ESC

Talks

Invited Talks

  • Zehua Xu, " LHCb overview ", 第6届LHCb前沿物理研讨会 , in Guangzhou, China, June 22-25, 2026

Regular Talks

Selected Talks (Prior to Joining USTC)

  • " Real-time alignment and calibration performance of LHCb with Run 3 data ", 42nd International Conference on High Energy Physics , in Prague, Czech Republic, July 12-15, 2024
  • " SciFi optimization during commissioning ", EPS-HEP 2023 Conference , in Hamburg, Germany, August 12-15, 2023
  • " Hadron spectroscopy at LHCb ", International Workshop on Hadron Structure and Spectroscopy 2023 , in Prague, Czechia, June 12-15, 2023
  • " Multiquark states at LHCb ", XI International Conference on New Frontiers in Physics , in Kolymbari, Crete, Greece, September 12-15, 2022
  • " Experimental Results in CKM and Hadron Spectroscopy areas ", Standard Model @ LHC' , in Geneva, Switzerland, April 12-15, 2022
  • " Recent exotic hadron results at LHCb ", 7th workshop on the XYZ particles , in Shandong University, Qingdao, China, May 15-18, 2021
  • " Observation of Zcs states at LHCb ", Experimental and theoretical status of and perspectives for XYZ states , in GSI, Darmstadt, Germany, April 12-15, 2021
  • " Exotic hadrons: recent LHCb discoveries ", Rencontres de Physique de la Vallee d'Aoste , in La Thuile, Aosta Valley, Italy, March 8-12, 2021
  • " Recent XYZ states at LHCb ", 6th workshop on the XYZ particles , in Fudan University, Shanghai, China, January 11-13, 2020
  • " Fast simulation of ECAL for LHCb Upgrade II ", The 5th China LHC Physics Workshop , in Dalian University of Technology, Dalian, China, October 23-27, 2019
  • " LHCb results on exotic hadrons ", Implications of LHCb measurements and future prospects , in CERN, Geneva, Switzerland, October 16-18, 2019
  • " ECAL - requirements from simulation ", 4th Workshop on LHCb Upgrade II , in Vondelkerk, Amsterdam, Netherland, April 8-10, 2019
  • " Heavy hadron production in proton-proton collisions at LHCb ", 中国物理学会高能物理分会第十届全国会员代表大会暨学术年会 , in Fuyue Hotel, Shanghai, China, June 19-24, 2018
